title: Final glance: framework + trade-offs + 1 story
focus: 5-minute scan of the framework + 5-minute scan of trade-offs + 1 story.

items.label: Run through your strongest story silently

interviewQuestions: What is the cleanest way to summarize the design framework in the first two minutes of an interview?
Which accuracy, latency, cost, or freshness trade-off would you proactively call out before the interviewer asks?
